title: OriginsSMP
description: OriginsSMP by levyTrotsky. Was originally made for a group of friends then became bigger, leading to a major jump in people and downloads.
body:
This modpack:

This Modpack is a heavily modded version of origins with a very active discord. This was built around the "Origins mod in spirt of the original "originSMP". Because of the original start of this modpack we had a small server and this modpack was for mainly, then as the modpack grew a public server was created for it (ip is in the discord with rules). The modpack has many origins addons and I the creator is willing to make more to be added, this modpack has biomes and storage mods to push things further. GL and Have fun :)
